_comment: Offline deterministic market-data STUB — the default MarketDataTool backend (CLAUDE.md principle 1: zero-keys-to-run, no runtime network calls). A real adapter (e.g. EDGAR + a delayed-quote API) sits behind the same interface, key-gated via .env (MARKET_DATA_API_KEY); when absent, this fixture serves. Every quote is explicitly labeled as-of/delayed — never presented as live execution-grade. as_of is pinned (no Date.now) so retrieval/eval stay deterministic.

MRB.name: Meridian Regional Bancorp, Inc.
MRB.label: Delayed snapshot (as-of close 2026-06-16). Not a live execution price.
